original_notebook_statement: Pattern-Day-Trader rule: >4 intraday equity trades / 5 days -> minimum $25,000 account margin.
current_update: FINRA Notice 26-10 says amendments replacing the day trading margin requirements are effective June 4, 2026, with member phase-in until October 20, 2027.
additive_note: Original lecture text preserved; this current regulatory update is added as of July 3, 2026.
